name: compdata-docling
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libgl1 libglib2.0-0 curl wget git procps && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir docling --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu && docling-tools models download && npm install -g @openai/codex
